_notes.base: RDRAM decimal offsets (N64 base 0x80000000 = decimal 2147483648, subtract to get RDRAM offset)
_notes.status: UNCONFIRMED — addresses from community research, must be verified against live emulator
_notes.verification_required: Before W2-A: run test_single_agent.py, observe RAM reads, confirm against known game state

player_offsets.note: P2/P3/P4 are at +0x100, +0x200, +0x300 byte offsets from P1 base (UNCONFIRMED)
